name: Call-Of-Doodie
currentFocus: Execution-quality refinement remains the core track: guided front-door UX, real code-splitting cleanup, and the first App-domain extraction now form the immediate implementation tranche, with trust/readability/pacing queued directly behind it.
nextMilestone: Ship the first coherent refinement tranche: simplify the menu around recommended actions, make lazy-loading materially reduce the initial bundle, and extract a self-contained App domain without regressing the deployable build.
